Assessment Blueprint Studio

TOS Generator + Course Test Bank

Create course-level question banks, assemble exams from the same course bank, tag each selected item to exam objectives, and generate the Table of Specifications automatically.

Automatic Reports

Backup and Restore

Recommended for large test banks
This app saves records in your browser using IndexedDB, with localStorage as fallback. Export backups regularly if you move devices, clear browser data, or use school lab computers.

Import Question Bank

Simple CSV format for MCQ and TF
CSV columns: type, stem, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, correct, chapter, topic, difficulty, bloom, aacsb, rationale, tags. For TF, use True or False as correct.

Equation Writer

Build equations visually. No LaTeX typing needed.
Symbols and Templates

Common symbols

Equation structures

Greek and statistics

Ready-made formulas

Your equation preview appears here.
Tip: Click a placeholder such as x, y, or n in the canvas and replace it with your own value.
